scope: Phase N6: bind the PROVEN, non-refuted native-ISA levers to the pure-search candidate system (search-owned, not manual flags)

search_owned_emission.provenance: search-space axis (not a manual flag bundle); ledger round-trips (prunes once recorded)

bound_candidate.flags: baseline_stack + DECODE_ATTN_NATIVE_ISA_BLOCK_TILE=1 (NO FIXED_S => dynamic-S; hardware-exp + scheduler default-on in renderer)

evaluator_output.provenance: W==D from Phase I harness (commit e60b2c857); token/determinism from in-model gate; route attribution clean

ledger_refuted_or_deferred.why: N1A hw-exp +27% & N3F dynamic-S +9.5% landed; correct+bound but 64.7% < 90% promotion threshold (CORRECT_BUT_NOT_FAST)
dead on live path (addresses use vector OOB-clamp); also SGPR-datapath fault. not a search axis
~0 W==D; native not occupancy-bound. excluded as primary lever
+4.6% only; latency occupancy-hidden. scheduler kept default-on but not a primary search axis

BLOCKED_REGALLOC: single-def linear-scan cannot represent stateful loop-carried physical accumulator; fix=regalloc feature(forbidden)/tile SSA rewrite(non-goal); ~10% ceiling. deferred, no impl, NOT a search axis

ledger_refuted_or_deferred.gate: W==D 64.7%/61.1% of owned @512/4096 (Phase I), token-match+route-bound+deterministic (in-model gate)
ledger_refuted_or_deferred.why: native-ISA route: N1A hw-exp(+27%)+N3F dynamic-S(+9.5%); correct+bound but 64.7% < 90% promotion threshold -> CORRECT_BUT_NOT_FAST

excluded_axes: N1B uniform scalar address (dead on live path)
next: N7 pre-promotion package (freeze the native dynamic-S route, multi-ctx W==D), then Phase O (native is CORRECT_BUT_NOT_FAST at 64.7% -> O likely AMD_NATIVE_Q4_8B_DECODE_ATTENTION_CORRECT_BUT_NOT_FAST unless the residual closes)
